---
title: "02_ARIMA_models"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(forecast)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(tseries)
```

```{r source-helpers}

```

### Load the Processed Data

```{r load-data}
# Load the processed data
df <- readRDS("../data/macro_df_diff.rds")
glimpse(df)
```
